data.title: Visual Systems & Brand Architecture
data.author: Elena Lysander
data.description: Master the art of building cohesive visual systems and scalable brand architectures that communicate across every touchpoint.

data.title: Scalable Frontend Architecture
data.author: Julian Marks
data.description: Deep dive into modern frontend patterns, component systems, and performance optimization strategies for large-scale applications.

data.title: The Psychology of Interaction
data.author: Sarah Vance
data.description: Explore the cognitive and emotional principles behind human-computer interaction and learn how to design experiences that feel effortless.

data.title: Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp
data.author: Marcus Chen
data.description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch. Build real-world projects using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, and databases.

data.title: Machine Learning Foundations
data.author: Priya Nair
data.description: Grasp the core concepts of machine learning, from supervised and unsupervised algorithms to model evaluation and deployment pipelines.

data.title: Product Thinking & Roadmapping
data.author: Liam Okafor
data.description: Develop product intuition, learn prioritization frameworks, and practice building roadmaps that align stakeholders and drive measurable outcomes.

data.title: User Research Methods & Synthesis
data.author: Aiko Tanaka
data.description: Learn qualitative and quantitative research techniques — from user interviews to usability testing — and turn insights into actionable design decisions.

data.title: Cloud-Native DevOps & CI/CD
data.author: Rodrigo Ferreira
data.description: Master Docker, Kubernetes, and modern CI/CD pipelines. Deploy, scale, and monitor cloud-native applications with confidence.

data.title: Design Thinking for Innovators
data.author: Nina Wolff
data.description: Apply the five stages of design thinking — empathize, define, ideate, prototype, and test — to solve complex real-world problems creatively.

data.title: Data Visualization & Storytelling
data.author: Ethan Brooks
data.description: Transform raw data into compelling narratives using tools like D3.js, Tableau, and Python. Learn to communicate insights that influence decisions.
